__comment: HeatPump Hero — Grafana Overview dashboard. Requires InfluxDB v2 datasource. Data written by the official HA InfluxDB integration (component: influxdb, api_version: 2). All queries use entity_id tag filter — adjust bucket name to match your setup (default: 'homeassistant').

targets.query:
from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_outdoor_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value}))
  |> yield(name: "Outdoor")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_inlet_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Return")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_outlet_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Supply")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_discharge_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "Discharge")

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_outdoor_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Outdoor T°"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_outlet_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Supply T°"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_inlet_temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Return T°"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_compressor_freq")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Compressor Hz"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_flow_rate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Water flow"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_compressor_freq")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Compressor Hz"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_pump_pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Pressure"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_cop_live")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "COP live"}))

supply = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_outlet_temp" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

return = from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_source_inlet_temp" and r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

join(tables: {supply: supply, return: return}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value_supply - r._value_return, _field: "ΔT (supply−return)"}))

from(bucket: v.bucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["entity_id"] == "sensor.hph_thermal_power_active")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Thermal power W"}))

title: HeatPump Hero — Overview
